title: TILE RITE Big Spin Hurricane 5mm Level Bases - Outdoor 20mm Porcelain Tile Leveller
features: Designed for Thick Tiles: Suitable for tile thicknesses from 15mm to 25mm – ideal for outdoor 20mm porcelain 5mm Grout Joint: Built-in spacer ensures a consistent 5mm joint between tiles Heavy-Duty Design: Engineered for external-grade tiles – strong and reliable under pressure Fast & Accurate Levelling: Minimises lippage and helps achieve perfectly flush tile surfaces BIG SPIN Compatible: Works with BIG SPIN reusable caps (sold separately)
description: BIG SPIN 5mm Deep Levelling Spacer Bases – For Outdoor 20mm Porcelain Tiles PK250 These 5mm deep spacer bases are designed for use with the BIG SPIN tile levelling system and are perfect for outdoor tiling projects using thick 20mm porcelain or natural stone tiles. Application: Use the bases underneath tile edges at corners. Place the tile, insert the base, screw on the BIG SPIN cap, and tighten by hand to level adjacent tiles. Once adhesive has cured, simply remove the cap and break off the base. Why Choose BIG SPIN? BIG SPIN is trusted by professional tilers and landscapers across the UK for its strength, ease of use, and precision. Whether you're working on a patio, terrace, or garden feature, this system ensures a professional finish every time. Need Caps or Other Sizes? Browse our full range of BIG SPIN accessories
